description.value:
A kite shield studded with dim amber lanterns that flare when allies are near. It is a +2 shield.

Curse. While equipped, every hostile attack roll made within 30 feet that could target the bearer or an ally instead resolves against the bearer if the attacker is not incapacitated (GM adjudicates edge cases). Cover and stealth still apply normally to the bearer.

unidentified.description: A kite shield with warm lantern studs. It feels like it wants to stand in front of everyone.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: +2 shield that lights the line when allies press close.
cursedMeta.trueNature: Hostile attacks within 30 ft that could target the bearer or an ally resolve against the bearer when possible.

curse.name: Bastion Beacon
curse.description: While equipped, eligible hostile attack rolls within 30 feet that could target the bearer or an ally are resolved against the bearer instead, unless the attacker is incapacitated (GM adjudicates edge cases).

hints: Arrows curve a finger's width toward the lantern studs mid-flight.

escalation.effect: One stray shot per session pings the shield first.
Area attacks pull their origin square toward the bearer.
Allies report 'odd targeting priority' in tactical talk.
